title: Investing-News-Scraper
description:
Investing News Scraper Inputs

provide input values below; examples are included inside each field description

links.title: Start links - Scrape specific pages or articles (Optional)
links.description:
you can scrape from a specific page/s only or scrape from a category - or scrape from a url and limit results to a specific category -

format examples
- single url: https://www.investing.com/news/latest-news/3
- multiple sources: add each source as a separate item in the list

note: leave empty to start with no urls and populate the request list dynamically

keywords.title: Filter by keywords
keywords.description:
add or remove keywords to search for

format examples
- single keyword: bitcoin
- phrase: "climate change"
- multiple entries: add each keyword/phrase as its own list item

note: leaving this list empty means no keyword filtering will be applied, keywords filtring is very slow and CaseSensitive.

categories.title: Select categories to scrape news from
categories.description: Categories to scrape from if you want to scrape from all categories choose 'all'

stopDate.title: Stop date
stopDate.description:
select the earliest article date allowed (get articles from today's date til the selected date) 

behavior
- always defaults to today's date if kept null
- the scraper stops when it encounters articles older than this date
- only articles published on or after this date will be returned

examples
- choose 2025-03-01 → articles from 2025-03-01 and newer are collected
- leave empty → no stop date limit is applied

filterFields.title: Filter Articles if missing a field
filterFields.description:
drop articles that are missing any of the selected fields

usage examples
- leave empty: no field-based filtering, return articles even if fields are missing
- single field: ["authors"] will drop articles with empty or missing authors
- multiple fields: ["title","body"] will drop articles missing either title or body

behavior
- selectable values mirror article fields; choose nothing, one, or many
- if you need to require at least one of several fields instead of all, handle in post-processing

maxArticles.title: Maximum Articles Amount
maxArticles.description:
set the maximum number of articles the actor will attempt to collect

behavior examples
- default 10: quick runs and testing
- prefill 1000: helpful example shown in the UI for larger harvests
- if you set 1000 you may still get fewer results depending on site availability

constraints
- minimum: 10
- maximum: 10000

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy configurations
proxyConfiguration.description:
specify which proxies the scraper should use (optional)

examples
- use apify proxy: set useApifyProxy to true
- custom proxy: provide a proxy url or configure your proxy pool in the platform

recommended usage
- enable proxies if you see empty results or frequent block responses
- keep useApifyProxy=false for local testing and enable in production runs
proxyConfiguration.sectionDescription: if you face problems with like no results returned then try to set this to use some proxies maybe this can solve the issue
